Artisan Patisserie

"Handcrafted every morning — never frozen, never rushed."

Every cake, tart, macaron, and croissant is made from scratch each morning at 40-06 34th Avenue. Premium cocoa, real cream, seasonal fruit. Nothing leaves our kitchen unless it's perfect.

The Menu

Made fresh every morning · Pickup & delivery 7am – 10pm

Most Ordered

Our guests' absolute favorites
Signature

Whole Celebration Cakes

Velvet-finished matcha, chocolate, or vanilla cakes with gold leaf and fresh fruit. Order 48hrs ahead.

Fan Favorite

Heart Entremets

Mirror-glazed raspberry and mango heart mousse cakes on a crisp sablé base. A Paris Oven signature.

Classic

Tiramisu

Espresso-soaked ladyfingers with silky mascarpone cream and premium cocoa powder.

Chocolate Hazelnut Bar

Dark chocolate base with caramelized hazelnuts, topped with five caramel cream rosettes.

Heart Bonbons

White & dark chocolate heart bonbons with hand-piped decoration and gold leaf finish.

Chocolate Decoration Cake

Cocoa-dusted sponge with signature hand-crafted chocolate piece detail.

Cakes & Entremets

Celebration cakes and glazed entremets — whole or by the slice
Custom

Whole Celebration Cakes

Matcha, chocolate, or vanilla velvet cakes with gold leaf and fresh raspberries. Order 48hrs ahead.

Raspberry Heart Entremet

Mirror-glazed heart mousse with fresh raspberry center and coconut whipped cream topping.

Heart Bonbon Collection

White chocolate, dark chocolate & red bonbons. Gold leaf decorated. Perfect for gifting.

Chocolate Caramel Cake

Rich dark chocolate layers with silky caramel cream and hand-crafted chocolate art piece.

Tiramisu Cake — Whole

Full tiramisu with mascarpone layers, espresso soak, and decorative cocoa finish.

Chocolate Hazelnut Bar

Dark chocolate, caramelized hazelnuts, five caramel cream rosettes. A house signature since day one.

Occasion Unforgettable

From intimate birthday cakes to full corporate spreads — every order handcrafted, packaged beautifully, delivered with care.

What We Offer

Catering for Every Moment

Birthday cakes, corporate spreads, wedding dessert tables, gift boxes. All handmade to order, packaged beautifully, delivered fresh.

Celebrations & Weddings

Custom whole cakes, dessert tables, bonbon collections, and pastry towers. Velvet, mirror glaze, or fondant finishes.

Custom Pricing · Order 72hrs Ahead

Corporate & Office

Breakfast pastry spreads, macaron boxes, and coffee service for meetings, client events, and team appreciation.

From · Minimum 12 Guests

Gift Boxes & Favors

Curated macaron boxes, pastry assortments, and bonbon collections. Perfect for holidays and wedding favors.

From · Ready in 24 Hours
How It Works

The Process

01

Submit Your Request

Fill out the form below or call us. Tell us your event type, guest count, and desired date.

02

We Confirm & Design

Our team responds within 24 hours with pricing, options, and design selections tailored to you.

03

Baked to Order

Everything made fresh for your event. No frozen items, no shortcuts — pure craft every time.

04

Pickup or Delivery

Collect from 40-06 34th Ave or arrange delivery. Every order packaged and presented beautifully.

Get in Touch

Request a Custom Order

Fill out the form and our team will respond within 24 hours with pricing and availability for your event.

  • Birthday & Anniversary Cakes
  • Corporate Breakfast Spreads
  • Holiday & Gift Pastry Boxes
  • Wedding & Engagement Dessert Tables
  • Macaron Towers & Displays
  • Custom Bonbon Collections

Our Story

Born in Queens.
Inspired by Paris.

A family-run patisserie bringing the handcrafted French pastry tradition to the streets of Long Island City, New York.

The Beginning

A Labor of Love,
Baked Daily

Paris Oven was founded on a simple belief: that a great pastry can transform an ordinary morning into something worth remembering. We brought the French patisserie tradition — the patience, the precision, the craft — to 34th Avenue in Long Island City.

Every cake, tart, and croissant is crafted from scratch each morning using only the finest ingredients: high-quality cocoa, real cream, fresh seasonal fruit, and European-style butter. Nothing frozen. Nothing rushed.

"It's a sweet, sweet life."

Today Paris Oven serves the Long Island City and Astoria community — neighbors, families, and anyone who walks in looking for something genuinely special.

Come Visit Us
Our Values

What We Stand For

🥐

Made from Scratch

Every item baked fresh each morning. We never use frozen pastries or pre-made components — ever.

🌾

Finest Ingredients

Premium cocoa, real cream, fresh seasonal fruit. No shortcuts, no compromise, no exceptions.

🎨

Craftsmanship

Every pastry is designed to delight the eyes first, then the palate. Art and flavor in equal measure.

🏘️

Community

We are Queens. Our neighbors inspire us every day and we're proud to serve this community.
